description_long: This object is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a full-rim rectangular frame with a subtle carbon fiber-like texture. The frame is moderately thick, providing both durability and a modern aesthetic, while the temples are straight and taper slightly towards the ends for a comfortable fit behind the ears. The lenses are a deep blue tint, offering a striking contrast to the dark frame and suggesting effective sun protection. The bridge is a classic saddle style, smoothly connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads. The temples display a consistent pattern matching the frame, with no visible engravings or embellishments. There are no visible brand logos or insignias on any part of the glasses.
description: A modern pair of sunglasses with a rectangular, carbon fiber-textured frame and deep blue tinted lenses. The design is sleek, with a full-rim structure and matching straight temples.
description_view_0: The left side of the glasses is visible, highlighting the carbon fiber texture and the deep blue tint of the lenses.
description_view_1: A rear three-quarter view shows the straight temples and the full-rim frame, emphasizing the overall symmetry and thickness.
description_view_2: The right side is visible, displaying the consistent frame texture and the curvature of the temples.
description_view_3: A front three-quarter view showcases both lenses, the bridge, and the uniform blue tint, giving a clear sense of the glasses' style.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular full-rim frame with moderate thickness and a subtle carbon fiber-like pattern; straight temples that taper slightly at the ends, providing a modern and robust appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: Deep blue tint with uniform coloration and moderate transparency; no visible gradient, mirror, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Classic saddle bridge, smoothly integrated into the frame without separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight with a matching carbon fiber-like texture, consistent thickness, and no visible engravings or decorative elements.
